name: interview_in_2_days_critical
raw: {"headline":"Yandex L4 in 2 days — capacity-estimation gap.","narrative":"Last system_design mock 2 days ago scored 5/10 with capacity-estimation flagged weak. You have 2 days until Yandex L4 interview, readiness_pct=40.","recommendations":[{"kind":"tiny_task","title":"Solve one capacity-estimation back-of-envelope drill (60s users, 1KB row).","rationale":"Last mock scored 5/10 on this section, Yandex interview in 2 days.","target_id":""},{"kind":"schedule","title":"Run a system_design mock today, focus on capacity-estimation.","rationale":"Last mock scored 5/10, Yandex interview in 2 days.","target_id":""},{"kind":"tiny_task","title":"Memorise Latency Numbers Every Programmer Should Know.","rationale":"Capacity-estimation rationale needs these constants live.","target_id":""}]}

name: weak_skill_nudge
raw: {"headline":"Graphs at 18/100 — focus there today.","narrative":"Skill_progress shows graphs at 18/100, the weakest in your atlas. 3 days of healthy focus — momentum is there, just point it at graphs.","recommendations":[{"kind":"tiny_task","title":"Solve one BFS problem on a small grid (5x5).","rationale":"Graphs is at 18/100; one solved problem typically lifts mastery 4-6 points.","target_id":""},{"kind":"tiny_task","title":"Read the BFS section of [graph fundamentals](/codex?topic=algorithms&article=bfs-overview) and write 2 takeaways.","rationale":"Atlas weakness is graphs; 10 min curated read locks the pattern.","target_id":""},{"kind":"schedule","title":"Block 30 min focus before lunch on graph drills.","rationale":"3 of 7 focus days hit 1h+, so 30 min is doable; pin it on calendar.","target_id":""}]}

name: abandoned_mocks_warn
raw: {"headline":"3 mocks abandoned in 14 days — consistency_break.","narrative":"You started 3 mock sessions in the last 14 days and bailed mid-way each time. The pattern suggests scope mismatch — 45-minute slots feel too long for current energy. Today's lever: pick a 20-min slot and finish it.","recommendations":[{"kind":"schedule","title":"Block one 20-min mock today, not 45.","rationale":"3 abandoned in 14 days; shorter slot increases finish probability.","target_id":""},{"kind":"tiny_task","title":"Pick one weak_topic and pre-write your high-level approach in 5 min.","rationale":"Pre-thinking before the mock cuts cold-start anxiety on resume.","target_id":""},{"kind":"schedule","title":"After the mock, write 1 line on what would have made you finish.","rationale":"3 unfinished mocks have no signal; one finish + reason is data.","target_id":""}]}

name: kata_streak_broken_nudge
raw: {"headline":"12-day kata streak broke — restart today.","narrative":"Your 12-day daily kata streak broke yesterday. Last kata was 2 days ago. Today's lever: solve one easy kata before lunch to restart the counter.","recommendations":[{"kind":"tiny_task","title":"Do today's daily kata — restart the streak counter.","rationale":"Streak was 12 days, broke yesterday; one kata today restarts to 1.","target_id":""},{"kind":"tiny_task","title":"Pick an easy kata, not medium — friction = re-skip.","rationale":"After a break, easy difficulty has 80% completion vs 50% for medium.","target_id":""},{"kind":"schedule","title":"Pin daily kata at 9:30 AM tomorrow as a fixed slot.","rationale":"Streak broke during free-floating timing; fixed slot prevents re-break.","target_id":""}]}

name: cruise_healthy
raw: {"headline":"Two days of solid 80-min focus — keep it.","narrative":"Last 2 days each landed 80+ min of deep focus across 3 pomodoros. No urgent bottleneck right now. Today's lever: pick the next thing on Atlas you've been avoiding and prep it.","recommendations":[{"kind":"tiny_task","title":"Pick one weak Atlas node and read its description block.","rationale":"2 days of healthy focus — invest in inventory pruning before next push.","target_id":""},{"kind":"schedule","title":"Schedule a 60-min focus block tomorrow on the same atlas node.","rationale":"Pomodoros at 3/day is sustainable; 60 min concrete target keeps it.","target_id":""},{"kind":"tiny_task","title":"Write 2 lines in daily note about today's actual blocker.","rationale":"Focus is up; reflection lag is the next leverage point.","target_id":""}]}

name: long_absence_welcome_back
raw: {"headline":"Welcome back — 20 days off, fresh start today.","narrative":"Last activity 20 days ago. Old data is stale, so today's lever is one tiny re-entry win — solve one easy kata, not the full plan.","recommendations":[{"kind":"tiny_task","title":"Solve one easy kata to restart momentum.","rationale":"20 days off, 1 finished problem restarts the muscle.","target_id":""},{"kind":"schedule","title":"Block 25 min focus this afternoon, not more.","rationale":"Fresh from a break, 25 min has 90% completion vs 60% for 60 min.","target_id":""},{"kind":"schedule","title":"Schedule a fresh diagnostic mock for tomorrow to recalibrate.","rationale":"After 20 days, old mock scores no longer reflect current level.","target_id":""}]}

name: simultaneous_critical_signals
raw: {"headline":"Stripe L5 + skill goal both due in 2 days.","narrative":"Stripe L5 interview in 48h with readiness=55%. Skill goal master rate-limiting also due in 2 days. Today's single lever: drill rate-limiting against Stripe-style sysdesign prompt.","recommendations":[{"kind":"schedule","title":"Run a 30-min sysdesign mock with rate-limiting as the headline constraint.","rationale":"Both signals point to rate-limiting; one mock buys 2 data points.","target_id":""},{"kind":"tiny_task","title":"Memorise token-bucket vs leaky-bucket tradeoffs in 10 min.","rationale":"Stripe interview is 2 days out; rate-limiting is the named gap.","target_id":""},{"kind":"tiny_task","title":"Write 3 distributed-rate-limit edge cases on paper.","rationale":"Skill goal due in 2 days plus Stripe interview overlaps.","target_id":""}]}

name: mock_topic_repeat_warn
raw: {"headline":"Caching flagged in 3 of 3 last mocks.","narrative":"Caching shows up as weak_topic in all 3 of your last system_design mocks (scores 5, 5, 6). Pattern, not noise. Today's lever: one focused caching drill before next mock.","recommendations":[{"kind":"tiny_task","title":"Read TTL+invalidation section of caching-strategies, write 3 takeaways.","rationale":"Caching weak_topic across 3 mocks; targeted reading converts pattern to fix.","target_id":""},{"kind":"schedule","title":"Run a system_design mock today, force a cache-heavy prompt.","rationale":"3 mocks scored 5-6 on caching; need a 4th data point post-fix.","target_id":""},{"kind":"tiny_task","title":"Implement a tiny LRU cache in 15 min, no library.","rationale":"Caching gap is 3-mock chronic; muscle memory beats theory here.","target_id":""}]}

name: track_stalled_5d_warn
raw: {"headline":"Senior Backend track stalled 6 days on locks.","narrative":"Active track Senior Backend stuck on step 3/8 'Distributed Locks' for 6 days. Skills zookeeper, redis-locks haven't seen any activity. Today's lever: one tiny win on redis-locks to unstick.","recommendations":[{"kind":"tiny_task","title":"Read the SETNX section of redis-locks docs, write 1 takeaway.","rationale":"Track step 3/8 stalled 6 days on this skill; 5-min read restarts.","target_id":""},{"kind":"schedule","title":"Block 25 min today to implement a redlock client.","rationale":"6 days stalled = friction is high; 25 min is doable to break it.","target_id":""},{"kind":"tiny_task","title":"Write 1 line in daily note: what scared you about distributed locks.","rationale":"6-day stall on the same step suggests avoidance, not lack of time.","target_id":""}]}

name: weak_skill_critical_15
raw: {"headline":"Consistent-hashing at 12/100 — pick today.","narrative":"Skill_progress shows consistent-hashing at 12/100, your weakest atlas node. Yesterday had 60 min of focus, momentum is there. Today's lever: one targeted drill on hash-ring placement.","recommendations":[{"kind":"tiny_task","title":"Implement a hash-ring with 3 virtual nodes per server in 20 min.","rationale":"consistent-hashing at 12/100; coding it from scratch lifts mastery 8-10 points.","target_id":""},{"kind":"tiny_task","title":"Read consistent-hashing primer, write 2 takeaways.","rationale":"12/100 weakest skill; 10 min reading covers the conceptual gap.","target_id":""},{"kind":"schedule","title":"Block 30 min focus before lunch on hash-ring drills.","rationale":"Yesterday hit 60 min; 30 min today maintains the rhythm.","target_id":""}]}

name: skipped_item_chronic_critical
raw: {"headline":"Prefix-sum skipped 4 times — chronic avoidance.","narrative":"You skipped 'review prefix-sum patterns' 4 times in the last 14 days. Pattern suggests friction or scope; today's lever is one 5-min first paragraph, not the full review.","recommendations":[{"kind":"unblock","title":"Open prefix-sum review and read just the first paragraph.","rationale":"Skipped 4 times in 14 days; tiny first step beats the wall.","target_id":"plan-skip-1"},{"kind":"tiny_task","title":"Solve one easy prefix-sum kata in 10 min.","rationale":"4 skips on review; flip to active drill for muscle memory.","target_id":""},{"kind":"tiny_task","title":"Write 1 line: what felt overwhelming about prefix-sum review.","rationale":"4 skips = avoidance; naming the friction is half the fix.","target_id":""}]}

name: goal_due_today_critical
raw: {"headline":"DDIA ch3 deadline is today — close it.","narrative":"Your skill_target 'Finish DDIA chapter 3' is due today. No buffer left. Today's only lever: read the remaining sections, mark complete.","recommendations":[{"kind":"schedule","title":"Block 50 min this morning to finish DDIA chapter 3.","rationale":"Goal deadline is today; missing it loses commitment momentum.","target_id":""},{"kind":"tiny_task","title":"Take 3 notes on storage-engines section while reading.","rationale":"Skill_keys=storage-engines; capturing while reading locks retention.","target_id":""},{"kind":"tiny_task","title":"Mark goal complete in tracker after final page.","rationale":"Closing the loop on a 0-day goal beats opening 3 new ones.","target_id":""}]}

name: interview_warn_4_to_7d
raw: {"headline":"Google L5 in 5 days — sharding still 6/10.","narrative":"Google L5 in 5 days at 60% readiness. Yesterday's mock scored 6/10 on system_design with sharding flagged weak. Today's lever: one targeted sharding drill.","recommendations":[{"kind":"tiny_task","title":"Solve one sharding-strategy back-of-envelope in 15 min.","rationale":"Google interview in 5 days, sharding flagged weak in yesterday's mock 6/10.","target_id":""},{"kind":"schedule","title":"Run a system_design mock tomorrow, force a sharding-heavy prompt.","rationale":"5 days to interview, 1 follow-up mock confirms or denies the gap.","target_id":""},{"kind":"tiny_task","title":"Memorise the 4 standard sharding strategies (range, hash, geo, dir).","rationale":"Google L5 likely covers sharding; flash facts beat improvising.","target_id":""}]}

name: queue_stalled_nudge
raw: {"headline":"0 of 5 done — refactor task stuck.","narrative":"Today's queue 0/5 done with 1 in_progress on 'Refactor handler chain'. Task likely too big or unclear. Today's lever: shrink it to a 5-min first slice.","recommendations":[{"kind":"unblock","title":"Open the handler-chain refactor and write 1 line: which file to touch first.","rationale":"In_progress for a while at 0/5 done; naming the first file unsticks.","target_id":"q-1"},{"kind":"tiny_task","title":"Pick the smallest of the 4 todo items, do that first.","rationale":"0/5 done = momentum issue; small win restarts.","target_id":""},{"kind":"schedule","title":"Block 25 min focus right after lunch on the smallest task.","rationale":"Queue stuck; pinned slot beats free-floating intent.","target_id":""}]}

raw: {"headline":"Graphs at 22/100 — try a tiny win, not a block.","narrative":"Last 3 'block focus' recs were dismissed in a row. Switch tactic: tiny actionable task instead of a calendar block. Graphs at 22/100 is the natural target.","recommendations":[{"kind":"tiny_task","title":"Solve one easy BFS kata in 10 min, no setup.","rationale":"3 dismissed schedule recs; 10-min kata bypasses the calendar friction.","target_id":""},{"kind":"tiny_task","title":"Read the 'BFS template' Atlas card, write 1 takeaway.","rationale":"Graphs 22/100 is gap; 5 min read replaces a 60-min block.","target_id":""},{"kind":"tiny_task","title":"Pick which 2 graph problems you'll do this week, write them in daily note.","rationale":"Dismissal pattern says block-time isn't working; commit to specific items instead.","target_id":""}]}
